objective: Inventory and classify recovered plus synthetic humanoid reference inputs already present in Forge, retain exact provenance and fixity, and define the smallest authority-safe reference set for engine-neutral structural generation.
next_action: Use bounded repository evidence search to locate recovered or synthetic humanoid reference candidates, classify each as usable inert evidence, ambiguous, duplicate, executable, or out of scope, record exact hashes and provenance, then design and adversarially verify the minimal H1 intake contract without downloading new material.
research_gate: Repository-local evidence and existing recovered archives only. No network acquisition, external executable content, silent baseline adoption, license assumptions, perceptual approval, or production promotion.
authority_lane: Owner-authorized implementation of the approved master plan. AI and recovered assets remain candidate evidence only; humans retain production-code, reference-selection, promotion, runtime, spending, publishing, credential, and engine authority.
context_health: Green after R0 clean-worktree acceptance. Primary Forge capture is current and heartbeat remains paused.
unresolved_risks: Recovered packages may contain duplicates, recap-only material, ambiguous provenance, or executable content.

exact repository-relative paths and SHA-256 fixity

verification_plan: use rg and the existing evidence finder rather than broad transcript reads
inspect archive manifests before extraction and use a short disposable path if extraction is needed
hash candidate files without modifying them
compare actual novelty and provenance against known survival-pack and recap-only sources
write or extend one canonical intake contract and result record
run focused and complete Forge gates
advance automatically to H2 only if H1 is verified
resume_after: Continue automatically after progress updates. Ask the owner only for a genuine authority boundary or an unresolvable provenance choice.
